description: Lightweight multi-protocol and multi-source download utility.

option.name: --all-proxy
tip: Use a proxy server for all protocols

option.name: --allow-overwrite
tip: Restart download from scratch if the corresponding control file doesn't exist

option.name: --allow-piece-length-change
tip: Allow piece length change when resuming download

option.name: --always-resume
tip: Always resume download. If true, aria2 always tries to resume

option.name: --async-dns-server
tip: Comma separated list of DNS server address used in asynchronous DNS resolver

option.name: --auto-file-renaming
tip: Rename file name if the same file already exists

option.name: --auto-save-interval
tip: Save a control file(*.aria2) every SEC seconds

option.name: --bt-detach-seed-only
tip: Exclude seed only downloads when counting concurrent active downloads

option.name: --bt-enable-hook-after-hash-check
tip: Allow hook command invocation after hash check in BitTorrent download

option.name: --bt-exclude-tracker
tip: Comma separated list of BitTorrent tracker's announce URI to remove

option.name: --bt-external-ip
tip: Specify the external IP address to use in BitTorrent download and DHT

option.name: --bt-force-encryption
tip: Requires BitTorrent message payload encryption with arc4

option.name: --bt-hash-check-seed
tip: After hash check and file is complete, continue to seed file

option.name: --bt-load-saved-metadata
tip: Before getting torrent metadata from DHT, first try to read file saved by --bt-save-metadata

option.name: --bt-lpd-interface
tip: Use given interface for Local Peer Discovery

option.name: --bt-max-open-files
tip: Specify maximum number of files to open in multi-file BitTorrent/Metalink downloads

option.name: --bt-max-peers
tip: Specify the maximum number of peers per torrent. 0 means unlimited

option.name: --bt-metadata-only
tip: Download metadata only. Effective only when BitTorrent Magnet URI is used

option.name: --bt-min-crypto-level
tip: Set minimum level of encryption method

option.name: --bt-prioritize-piece
tip: Try to download first and last pieces of each file first

option.name: --bt-remove-unselected-file
tip: Removes the unselected files when download is completed in BitTorrent

option.name: --bt-request-peer-speed-limit
tip: If the whole download speed is lower than SPEED, aria2 increases the number of peers

option.name: --bt-require-crypto
tip: If true, aria2 doesn't accept legacy BitTorrent handshake

option.name: --bt-save-metadata
tip: Save metadata as .torrent file. Effective only when BitTorrent Magnet URI is used

option.name: --bt-seed-unverified
tip: Seed previously downloaded files without verifying piece hashes

option.name: --bt-stop-timeout
tip: Stop BitTorrent download if download speed is 0 in consecutive SEC seconds

option.name: --bt-tracker
tip: Comma separated list of additional BitTorrent tracker's announce URI

option.name: --bt-tracker-connect-timeout
tip: Set the connect timeout in seconds to establish connection to tracker

option.name: --bt-tracker-interval
tip: Set the interval in seconds between tracker requests

option.name: --ca-certificate
tip: Use the certificate authorities in FILE to verify the peers

option.name: --certificate
tip: Use the client certificate in FILE

option.name: --check-certificate
tip: Verify the peer using certificates specified in --ca-certificate

option.name: --check-integrity
tip: Check file integrity by validating piece hashes or a hash of entire file

option.name: --checksum
tip: Set checksum. TYPE is hash type, DIGEST is hex digest

option.name: --conditional-get
tip: Download file only when the local file is older than remote file

option.name: --conf-path
tip: Change the configuration file path to PATH

option.name: --connect-timeout
tip: Set the connect timeout in seconds

option.name: --console-log-level
tip: Set log level to output to console

option.name: --content-disposition-default-utf8
tip: Handle quoted string in Content-Disposition header as UTF-8 instead of ISO-8859-1

option.name: --continue
tip: Continue downloading a partially downloaded file

option.name: --deferred-input
tip: If true, aria2 does not read all URIs at startup but reads one by one

option.name: --dht-entry-point
tip: Set host and port as an entry point to IPv4 DHT network

option.name: --dht-entry-point6
tip: Set host and port as an entry point to IPv6 DHT network

option.name: --dht-file-path
tip: Change the IPv4 DHT routing table file to PATH

option.name: --dht-file-path6
tip: Change the IPv6 DHT routing table file to PATH

option.name: --dht-listen-addr6
tip: Specify address to bind socket for IPv6 DHT

option.name: --dht-listen-port
tip: Set UDP listening port used by DHT(IPv4, IPv6) and UDP tracker

option.name: --dir
tip: The directory to store the downloaded file

option.name: --disk-cache
tip: Enable disk cache. SIZE can include K or M

option.name: --download-result
tip: Change the way 'Download Results' is formatted

next.name: default
tip: Print GID, status, average download speed and path/URI

next.name: full
tip: Print GID, status, speed, percentage of progress and path/URI

option.name: --dry-run
tip: If true, aria2 just checks whether the remote file is available and doesn't download data

option.name: --dscp
tip: Set DSCP value in outgoing IP packets of BitTorrent traffic for QoS

option.name: --enable-async-dns6
tip: Enable IPv6 name resolution in asynchronous DNS resolver

option.name: --enable-color
tip: Enable color output for a terminal

option.name: --enable-dht
tip: Enable IPv4 DHT functionality. It also enables UDP tracker support

option.name: --event-poll
tip: Specify the method for polling events

next.name: falloc
tip: Allocate large files almost instantly (ext4, btrfs, xfs, NTFS)

next.name: prealloc
tip: Pre-allocate file space before download begins

next.name: trunc
tip: Use ftruncate() to truncate a file to a specified length

option.name: --follow-metalink
tip: When a metalink file is downloaded, parse it and download its contents

next.name: false
tip: Download metalink file to disk without parsing

next.name: mem
tip: Keep metalink in memory without writing to disk

option.name: --follow-torrent
tip: When a .torrent file is downloaded, parse it and download its contents

next.name: false
tip: Download .torrent file to disk without parsing

next.name: mem
tip: Keep torrent in memory without writing to disk

option.name: --force-save
tip: Save download with --save-session option even if completed or removed

option.name: --force-sequential
tip: Fetch URIs in the command-line sequentially

option.name: --ftp-passwd
tip: Set FTP password. This affects all URLs

option.name: --ftp-pasv
tip: Use the passive mode in FTP. If false, the active mode will be used

option.name: --ftp-proxy
tip: Use a proxy server for FTP

option.name: --ftp-user
tip: Set FTP user. This affects all URLs

option.name: --gid
tip: Set GID manually. The GID must be hex string of 16 characters

option.name: --hash-check-only
tip: After hash check, abort download whether or not download is complete

option.name: --header
tip: Append HEADER to HTTP request header

option.name: --http-accept-gzip
tip: Send 'Accept-Encoding: deflate, gzip' request header and inflate response

option.name: --http-auth-challenge
tip: Send HTTP authorization header only when it is requested by the server

option.name: --http-no-cache
tip: Send Cache-Control: no-cache and Pragma: no-cache header to avoid cached content

option.name: --http-passwd
tip: Set HTTP password. This affects all URLs

option.name: --http-proxy
tip: Use a proxy server for HTTP

option.name: --http-user
tip: Set HTTP user. This affects all URLs

option.name: --https-proxy
tip: Use a proxy server for HTTPS

option.name: --human-readable
tip: Print sizes and speed in human readable format in the console readout

option.name: --index-out
tip: Set file path for file with index=INDEX

option.name: --keep-unfinished-download-result
tip: Keep unfinished download results even if exceeding --max-download-result

option.name: --listen-port
tip: Set TCP port number for BitTorrent downloads

option.name: --load-cookies
tip: Load Cookies from FILE using the Firefox3 format

option.name: --log
tip: The file name of the log file

option.name: --log-level
tip: Set log level to output to file specified using --log option

option.name: --lowest-speed-limit
tip: Close connection if download speed is lower than or equal to this value

option.name: --max-concurrent-downloads
tip: Set maximum number of parallel downloads

option.name: --max-connection-per-server
tip: The maximum number of connections to one server for each download

option.name: --max-download-limit
tip: Set max download speed per each download in bytes/sec. 0 means unrestricted

option.name: --max-download-result
tip: Set maximum number of download result kept in memory

option.name: --max-file-not-found
tip: Force the download to fail after NUM 'file not found' responses

option.name: --max-mmap-limit
tip: Set the maximum file size to enable mmap

option.name: --max-overall-download-limit
tip: Set max overall download speed in bytes/sec. 0 means unrestricted

option.name: --max-overall-upload-limit
tip: Set max overall upload speed in bytes/sec. 0 means unrestricted

option.name: --max-resume-failure-tries
tip: When used with --always-resume=false, aria2 downloads from scratch after N failures

option.name: --max-tries
tip: Set number of tries. 0 means unlimited

option.name: --max-upload-limit
tip: Set max upload speed per each torrent in bytes/sec. 0 means unrestricted

option.name: --metalink-base-uri
tip: Specify base URI to resolve relative URI in metalink file

option.name: --metalink-enable-unique-protocol
tip: If true, aria2 uses one of several protocols available for a mirror in a metalink file

option.name: --metalink-file
tip: The file path to the .meta4 and .metalink file

option.name: --metalink-language
tip: The language of the file to download

option.name: --metalink-location
tip: The location of the preferred server

option.name: --metalink-os
tip: The operating system of the file to download

option.name: --metalink-version
tip: The version of the file to download

option.name: --min-split-size
tip: aria2 does not split less than 2*SIZE byte range

option.name: --min-tls-version
tip: Specify minimum SSL/TLS version to enable

option.name: --multiple-interface
tip: Comma separated list of interfaces to bind sockets to

option.name: --netrc-path
tip: Specify the path to the netrc file

option.name: --no-file-allocation-limit
tip: No file allocation is made for files whose size is smaller than SIZE

option.name: --no-proxy
tip: Specify comma separated hostnames, domains or network address where proxy should not be used

option.name: --no-want-digest-header
tip: Disable Want-Digest header when doing requests

option.name: --on-bt-download-complete
tip: Set the command to be executed after download completed but before seeding

option.name: --on-download-complete
tip: Set the command to be executed after download completed

option.name: --on-download-error
tip: Set the command to be executed after download aborted due to error

option.name: --on-download-pause
tip: Set the command to be executed after download was paused

option.name: --on-download-start
tip: Set the command to be executed after download got started

option.name: --on-download-stop
tip: Set the command to be executed after download stopped

option.name: --optimize-concurrent-downloads
tip: Optimizes the number of concurrent downloads according to the bandwidth available

option.name: --out
tip: The file name of the downloaded file

option.name: --pause
tip: Pause download after added. Effective only when --enable-rpc=true

option.name: --pause-metadata
tip: Pause downloads created as a result of metadata download

option.name: --peer-agent
tip: Set client reported during Extended torrent handshakes

option.name: --peer-id-prefix
tip: Specify the prefix of peer ID

option.name: --piece-length
tip: Set a piece length for HTTP/FTP downloads

option.name: --private-key
tip: Use the private key in FILE

option.name: --proxy-method
tip: Set the method to use in proxy request

option.name: --realtime-chunk-checksum
tip: Validate chunk of data by calculating checksum while downloading

option.name: --referer
tip: Set an http referrer (Referer). This affects all http/https downloads

option.name: --remote-time
tip: Retrieve timestamp of the remote file and apply it to the local file

option.name: --retry-wait
tip: Set the seconds to wait between retries

option.name: --reuse-uri
tip: Reuse already used URIs if no unused URIs are left

option.name: --rpc-allow-origin-all
tip: Add Access-Control-Allow-Origin header with value '*' to the RPC response

option.name: --rpc-certificate
tip: Use the certificate in FILE for RPC server

option.name: --rpc-listen-all
tip: Listen incoming JSON-RPC/XML-RPC requests on all network interfaces

option.name: --rpc-listen-port
tip: Specify a port number for JSON-RPC/XML-RPC server to listen to

option.name: --rpc-max-request-size
tip: Set max size of JSON-RPC/XML-RPC request

option.name: --rpc-private-key
tip: Use the private key in FILE for RPC server

option.name: --rpc-save-upload-metadata
tip: Save the uploaded torrent or metalink metadata in the directory specified by --dir

option.name: --rpc-secure
tip: RPC transport will be encrypted by SSL/TLS

option.name: --save-cookies
tip: Save Cookies to FILE in Mozilla/Firefox/Netscape format

option.name: --save-not-found
tip: Save download with --save-session option even if the file was not found

option.name: --save-session
tip: Save error/unfinished downloads to FILE on exit

option.name: --save-session-interval
tip: Save error/unfinished downloads every SEC seconds

option.name: --seed-ratio
tip: Specify share ratio. Seed completed torrents until share ratio reaches RATIO

option.name: --select-file
tip: Set file to download by specifying its index

option.name: --server-stat-if
tip: Specify the filename to load performance profile of the servers

option.name: --server-stat-of
tip: Specify the filename to which performance profile of the servers is saved

option.name: --server-stat-timeout
tip: Specifies timeout in seconds to invalidate performance profile of the servers

option.name: --show-files
tip: Print file listing of .torrent, .meta4 and .metalink file and exit

option.name: --socket-recv-buffer-size
tip: Set the maximum socket receive buffer in bytes

option.name: --split
tip: Download a file using N connections

option.name: --ssh-host-key-md
tip: Set checksum for SSH host public key

option.name: --stderr
tip: Redirect all console output that would be printed in stdout to stderr

option.name: --stop
tip: Stop application after SEC seconds has passed

option.name: --stop-with-process
tip: Stop application when process PID is not running

option.name: --stream-piece-selector
tip: Specify piece selection algorithm used in HTTP/FTP download

next.name: default
tip: Selects piece to reduce the number of establishing connection

next.name: geom
tip: Like inorder but exponentially keeps space from previously selected piece

next.name: inorder
tip: Selects piece which has minimum index

option.name: --summary-interval
tip: Set interval to output download progress summary

option.name: --truncate-console-readout
tip: Truncate console readout to fit in a single line

next.name: adaptive
tip: Selects one of the best mirrors for the first connections

next.name: feedback
tip: Uses download speed observed in previous downloads

next.name: inorder
tip: URI is tried in the order appeared in the URI list

option.name: --use-head
tip: Use HEAD method for the first request to the HTTP server

option.name: --user-agent
tip: Set user agent for http(s) downloads

option.name: --version
tip: Print the version number and exit

global_option.name: --help
tip: Print usage and exit. Use --help=#TAG to filter by tag
